title: nassella smithii
intro: Nassella smithii, also known as Needle and Thread Grass, is a species of grass native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nassella smithii include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Nassella smithii is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
